---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Please don't attach your PDF or any sensitive content.** PDkef runs entirely on
your device and never uploads your files, so I can't see them and don't want copies.
A description or a screenshot with private parts blacked out is plenty.

**Which tool?**
e.g. Merge, Split, Sign, Redact, Compress, Unlock, Image to PDF...

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen instead.

**Screenshots**
If it helps, add a screenshot. Please redact anything private first.

**Your setup**
 - Device: [e.g. desktop, iPhone 15]
 - OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11, iOS 17]
 - Browser and version: [e.g. Chrome 120, Safari 17]

**Browser console errors**
If you're comfortable: open the browser console (F12 or right-click to Inspect,
then the Console tab), reproduce the bug, and paste any red error lines here. This
is often the single most useful thing for diagnosing a problem.

**Additional context**
Anything else worth knowing (file size, number of pages, roughly what the PDF was).
